properties.description: Geospatial ML pipeline over Microsoft's 129M U.S. buildings dataset, applying 5-stage geometry filtering to surface 11,577 commercial rooftop candidates with viability score >= 70. LLM-powered report generator using Gemini 2.0 Flash and LangChain, synthesizing geospatial scores, 30-year precipitation data, and viability metrics into investor-ready briefs.

properties.description: Healthcare robot combining DeepFace emotion recognition and LangChain RAG over medical knowledge base, achieving 94% emotion detection accuracy with sub-1s conversational response latency.
